decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to utilize powerful reanimation spells like Doomsday Excruciator and Bitter Triumph to bring back strong creatures from the graveyard and overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Stock Up and Day of Black Sun to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Additionally, there are some evasion tools like Superior Spider-Man and Winternight Stories to protect your creatures and pressure the opponent. Overall, this combo reanimator deck aims to quickly assemble its key pieces and dominate the battlefield.

The key concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and instant spells, focusing on quick damage and card advantage. Utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent to deal direct damage while maintaining card advantage through Sleight of Hand and Opt. The deck also includes cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off to provide additional pressure on the opponent. The deck aims to control the battlefield with efficient creatures and spell damage, while maintaining card advantage to stay ahead in the game.

This deck focuses on using a combination of aggressive creatures, burn spells, and disruption to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory. By efficiently using creatures like Flamebraider and Ashling, Rekindled alongside powerful spells like Burst Lightning and Wistfulness, the deck aims to apply constant pressure while disrupting the opponent's game plan. The mana base is optimized for consistency and includes key lands like Cavern of Souls and Steam Vents to support the aggressive strategy. Overall, the deck's main goal is to establish a strong board presence and finish the game before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay with a mix of blue and red cards. It includes cards that allow for cheap and efficient card draw, as well as creatures with evasion and potent abilities. The strategy revolves around quickly building a board presence and overwhelming the opponent before they can stabilize. With a mix of card advantage, direct damage, and creatures with powerful abilities, this deck puts pressure on the opponent from the very beginning of the game and aims to quickly close out the match.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of fast airborne creatures and powerful enchantments. By utilizing cards like Haliya, Guided by Light and Starfield Shepherd to boost your creatures, and cards like Springleaf Drum to ramp up your mana, you can quickly outpace and outmaneuver your opponent. Quantum Riddler and Sage of the Skies provide additional support and disruption, while Multiversal Passage gives you flexibility in your mana base. With a strong mix of aggression and control, this Azorius Aggro deck aims to dominate the battlefield and secure a swift victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by manipulating the opponent's resources and slowing down their strategy. It includes plenty of card draw and card filtering to ensure you have the right answers at the right time. The deck also includes a mix of counter spells, removal, and creatures that can lock down the board. The goal is to outlast your opponent and win through attrition by efficiently managing your resources and disrupting your opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying creatures and spells to put pressure on the opponent, utilizing card draw and cheap burn spells to maintain tempo. With a focus on evasion and aggressive creatures, it aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize. The deck also includes some control elements like bounce spells and graveyard hate to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The mana base is carefully crafted to ensure a smooth curve and consistent access to both red and blue mana sources.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using a combination of removal spells and artifacts to disrupt the opponent's strategies. It aims to slow down the opponent's game plan with cards like Cryogen Relic and Perilous Snare, while also setting up a win condition with cards like Phoenix Fleet Airship and Spring-Loaded Sawblades. The various artifacts in the deck provide utility and synergy with each other, allowing the player to dictate the pace of the game and outvalue the opponent in the long run.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble a fast and aggressive Simic Aggro strategy, utilizing cards like Brightglass Gearhulk, Ouroboroid, and Badgermole Cub to quickly overwhelm opponents. With a mix of powerful creatures, support spells like Nature's Rhythm and Multiversal Passage, and ramp from Llanowar Elves, the deck aims to establish board dominance and close out games swiftly. The inclusion of cards like Archdruid's Charm and Craterhoof Behemoth provide additional versatility and finishers for different situations, while maintaining a consistent pressure on the opponent.

Utilizing graveyard synergies and efficient reanimation strategies, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and combo interactions. By filling the graveyard with key creatures and then bringing them back onto the battlefield, the deck can generate immense value and pressure. Key cards such as Bringer of the Last Gift and Overlord of the Balemurk facilitate this process, supported by card draw and removal spells to control the board and protect its game plan. The deck's strength lies in its ability to execute explosive plays and outvalue opponents through its graveyard manipulation and reanimation abilities.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Flamebraider and Ashling, Rekindled, supported by spells like Burst Lightning and Wistfulness to maintain board presence and deal damage to the opponent's life total. The use of cards like Roaming Throne and Sunderflock provide additional value and tempo advantage. The mana base is optimized to allow for consistent casting of spells and creatures, with a mix of land types to support the deck's color requirements. The overall strategy is to beat down the opponent quickly and efficiently while controlling the board.

The deck focuses on creating an overwhelming board presence through a combination of aggressive creatures like Badgermole Cub and Ouroboroid, alongside powerful support cards like Gene Pollinator and Nature's Rhythm. Utilizing mana acceleration with Llanowar Elves and land search with cards like Abandoned Air Temple and Hushwood Verge, the deck aims to quickly ramp up and overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures. With a mix of card draw, removal, and protection spells, the deck aims to maintain its tempo and pressure throughout the game.

This Orzhov Aggro deck focuses on quickly building a strong board presence with low-cost creatures like Sage of the Skies and Momo, Friendly Flier, supported by cards like Springleaf Drum and Seam Rip for additional benefits. The deck also includes powerful removal spells like Tragic Trajectory to control the opponent's board while maintaining aggression. The inclusion of cards like Haliya, Guided by Light and Starfield Shepherd offers additional support and protection for your creatures. With a mix of flying creatures and versatile spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with speed and efficiency.

This mono green aggro deck focuses on playing low-cost creatures and ramping up mana quickly with cards like Llanowar Elves and Esper Origins. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with early board presence and efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. Utilizing cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension, the deck aims to finish the opponent off quickly before they have a chance to stabilize. Cards like Escape Tunnel provide evasion and protection, while cards like Meltstrider's Resolve and Royal Treatment offer additional combat tricks to keep up the pressure.

The deck focuses on utilizing control elements to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining card advantage. By using cards like Eddymurk Crab, Sunderflock, and Abandon Attachments, it can control the board and remove threats efficiently. Additionally, cards like Spell Pierce and Spell Snare provide counterspells to deal with opposing spells. With a mix of removal spells like Burst Lightning and Abrade, along with card draw from Opt and Winternight Stories, the deck aims to outlast opponents and secure victory through attrition. The mana base supports a balance of Islands and red sources for optimal spell casting.

This Simic Aggro deck focuses on creating a strong board presence and overwhelming the opponent with efficient creatures and spells. It utilizes cards like Gene Pollinator and Badgermole Cub to quickly establish a threatening board, while maintaining card advantage with cards like Ouroboroid and Spider Manifestation. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Craterhoof Behemoth and Soul-Guide Lantern to close out games. By combining aggressive creatures with disruptive spells, this deck aims to apply pressure from the early turns while maintaining a solid board presence throughout the game.
